flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Dubuque rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.0k → $42.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Dubuque rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.0k → $42.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Dubuque fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Dubuque rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (61.9% → 76.6%).
